title: Censored Office Manga Confrontation
author: 小猫遊りょう（たかにゃし・りょう）
prompt: A dramatic black-and-white manga page in a seinen style, rendered with dense screentones, sharp ink lines, high contrast lighting, and expressive Japanese comic layout. The page has 4 stacked panels with vertical Japanese speech bubbles and bold sound effects, showing a tense confrontation between two office workers in a modern workspace. In the top panel, a young woman with a short messy bob haircut, slim but curvy build, wearing a fitted button-up blouse with rolled sleeves and a dark pencil skirt, slams one hand hard onto a desk in anger, leaning forward toward the viewer with explosive impact lines and a large jagged speech bubble. In the second panel, a young man with dark tousled hair, slim build, wearing a black leather jacket over a light shirt and a necklace, is shown from the chest up in a calm, confident pose, touching his face while speaking. In the third panel, the man pins the woman against a wall in a close, intimate kabedon pose, one arm braced beside her head; she looks flustered and tense while he speaks near her face, creating a sudden romantic-comedic shift in mood. In the bottom panel, an overhead view reveals the office setting: 2 characters standing near a desk with 1 computer monitor, 1 keyboard, 1 mouse, 1 office chair, and scattered papers on a tiled floor; the woman is curled inward shyly and trembling while the man stands relaxed beside her. Include exactly 4 panels, exactly 4 visible speech bubbles total, and visible Japanese manga typography throughout. Add a rectangular mosaic censor blur over each character's face in every panel, as if anonymized for sharing online. Background details should include office walls, desk edges, speed lines, burst effects, and tonal gradients. The overall feeling is intense argument turning into manipulative flirtation, like a viral out-of-context manga screenshot.

title: 日本绿色科技宣传拼贴画
author: もっつぃ🌳
prompt: {"type":"用于绿色科技数字服务的日本 2x2 宣传册拼贴画","style":"简洁的企业广告风格，现代环保品牌设计，柔和的自然光，逼真的照片合成，极少的 AI 伪影，白色与绿色调色板，精致的日文排版，方形布局","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"1:1","size":"1536x1536"},"layout":{"grid":"2x2","count":4,"sections":[{"position":"top-left","title":"みどりが、未来をつなぐ。","subtitle":"デジタルの力で、都市に新しい緑を。","scene":"一条明亮的未来主义城市大道，两旁种满了健康的绿树和景观绿化带，玻璃摩天大楼隐没在淡淡的薄雾中，半透明的仪表盘叠加在街道上方，显示着 60、76、45 和 48 等圆形和条形图分析数据","features":{"count":3,"labels":["绿地管理的 DX","数据分析与可视化","智能监控"]},"brand_bar":{"product_name":"MIDORI DX","tagline":"みどりメディカルで、持続可能な社会を。","sublabel":"みどりDXソリューション"}},{"position":"top-right","title":"見るだけで、自然がもっと面白くなる。","subtitle":"ARで学ぶ、身近な緑の世界。","scene":"一只手拿着智能手机在茂密的绿色植物和树干前，手机屏幕显示着 AR 风格识别出的树木，并带有逼真的独立树木模型","screen_text":{"main_name":"クスノキ","latin_name":"Cinnamomum camphora","confidence":"85%"},"features":{"count":3,"labels":["AR 植物图鉴","学习内容","地图与景点导览"]},"brand_bar":{"product_name":"グリーンビュー","english_name":"GREEN VIEW","tagline":"自然とつながるデジタル体験を。"}},{"position":"bottom-left","title":"データで変える、緑の未来。","subtitle":"緑地管理をスマートに、効率的に。","scene":"干净桌面上的笔记本电脑和智能手机样机，两者均显示着以绿色为主题的分析仪表盘，包含地图、饼图、折线图和管理面板","features":{"count":4,"labels":["设施与树木管理一体化","通过数据分析实现最优维护","异常检测与警报通知","云端随时随地查看"]},"brand_bar":{"product_name":"GreenManager DX","japanese_name":"グリーンマネージャーDX","tagline":"緑地管理のDXで、街と自然をずっと美しく。"}},{"position":"bottom-right","title":"緑の取り組みをデジタルでつなぐ。","subtitle":"サステナブルな活動を、もっと多くの人へ。","description":"支持从信息发布到参与及共享的沟通平台","scene":"柔和绿色和蓝色调的扁平化公园插画场景，小群的人们在树木、小径、灌木和远处的城市建筑间行走、交谈、志愿服务和聚集","features":{"count":4,"labels":["活动信息发布","活动与志愿者招募","活动记录与报告共享","成果可视化与数据公开"]},"brand_bar":{"product_name":"みどりコネクト","english_name":"MIDORI CONNECT","tagline":"つながる、ひろがる、みどりの輪。"}}]},"design_notes":{"typography":"大型粗体日文无衬线标题，较小的简洁无衬线正文，关键词处使用绿色强调","iconography":"圆形绿色圆圈或轮廓瓷砖内的简单线条图标","branding":"一致的叶子图案和生态科技视觉语言","mood":"乐观、创新、可持续、平易近人的企业营销风格"}}

title: 极简马格努斯效应信息图
author: 1LittleCoder💻
prompt:
{"type":"教育物理信息图海报","topic":"马格努斯效应","style":"极简学术海报，高端教科书与现代设计结合，对称简洁，间距平衡，柔和中性奶油色背景，细青色边框，标题采用优雅衬线字体，说明文字采用极简无衬线字体，配色方案限定为青色、柔和金色、深灰色和浅米色","layout":{"orientation":"方形海报","sections":[{"title":"马格努斯效应","position":"顶部居中","count":1,"labels":["主标题"]},{"title":"1. 现象定义","position":"上部区域","count":2,"labels":["定义文本框","右上角小图标，显示带有弯曲箭头和金色力标签 F_M 的旋转球体"]},{"title":"2. 流体流动与旋转交互","position":"中部区域","count":2,"labels":["无旋转（对称流动）","有旋转（非对称流动）"]},{"title":"3. 压力差（伯努利原理）","position":"左下角","count":4,"labels":["低压 (P1) / P1 < P2","带有金色旋转箭头的旋转球体","高压 (P2) / P2 > P1","伯努利原理公式框"]},{"title":"4. 合力与弯曲路径","position":"右下角","count":4,"labels":["球体，顶部和底部标有压力标签 P1 < P2","标有 F_M（马格努斯力）的向上金色箭头","灰色虚线表示原始路径","青色虚线表示弯曲轨迹"]}],"dividers":"4 条细青色水平和垂直分割线，将海报分为不同的区域和下方的双栏面板"},"content_details":{"section_1":{"heading":"1. 现象定义","body":"当旋转物体在流体（气体或液体）中运动时，会产生侧向力，使其偏离原始飞行路径。","diagram":"简单的灰色圆形球体图标，上方带有弯曲的旋转箭头，一个向外弯曲的运动箭头，以及一个包含 F_M 的小型圆角金色方框"},"section_2":{"heading":"2. 流体流动与旋转交互","panels":[{"title":"无旋转（对称流动）","diagram":"灰色球体位于浅色方格网格中心，6 条青色水平流线从左向右流动，并在球体周围对称弯曲；小型青色箭头表示球体上方和下方的流速相等"},{"title":"有旋转（非对称流动）","diagram":"灰色球体周围带有 2 个金色旋转箭头，位于浅色方格网格中心，6 条青色流线在球体上方被压缩且流速更快，下方则较为稀疏；右侧标签显示上方流线附近为 '流速快, v↑'，下方流线附近为 '流速慢, v↓'；右上角流体区域后方有微妙的金色高亮楔形"}]},"section_3":{"heading":"3. 压力差（伯努利原理）","elements":["顶部圆角矩形，带有低压标签","中心旋转球体，带有金色弯曲箭头","大型垂直向下金色箭头，标注为压力梯度 (ΔP)","底部圆角矩形，带有高压标签","宽大的公式框，包含伯努利方程"],"text_boxes":{"top":"低压 (P1)
P1 < P2","bottom":"高压 (P2)
P2 > P1","formula":"伯努利原理：
P + 1/2 ρv^2 = 常数 ⇒ ΔP ∝ (v1^2 − v2^2)","caption":"流速越快 (v↑)，压力越低 (P↓)。"}},"section_4":{"heading":"4. 合力与弯曲路径","diagram":"大型中心球体，填充青色至金色的渐变色，左侧环绕金色弯曲旋转箭头，顶部伸出粗大的向上金色箭头，标注为 F_M（马格努斯力），细灰色虚线水平箭头标注为原始路径并向右延伸，青色虚线弯曲轨迹向上方右侧弧形延伸并带有箭头","caption_box":"净马格努斯力 (F_M) 作用于垂直于旋转轴和运动方向的位置，从而产生升力或弯曲轨迹。"}},"rendering":"清晰的矢量风格信息图，微妙的纸张纹理，高可读性，仅在圆角标签框内有轻微阴影，精确对齐，低调的科学美感"}

title: Anime Romance Movie Poster
author: studioあぽろん
prompt: A Japanese theatrical romance movie poster in a tall smartphone-style vertical layout with rounded corners, designed like a polished anime key visual. The main image shows a beautiful teenage billboard girl heroine standing on an outdoor balcony at dusk, turning back over her shoulder to look at the viewer with a soft, wistful expression. She has very long silver-white twin-tail hair tied with dark ribbons, pale skin, and large pink-violet eyes. She wears a delicate white frilled blouse with voluminous sleeves and a dark high-waisted dress or corset-like skirt, creating an elegant, slightly gothic school-romance look. The atmosphere is dreamy and emotional, filled with glowing bokeh lights, drifting petals or snow-like sparkles, sunset pink and lavender light, and a luminous cityscape in the blurred background. Use rich cinematic anime rendering, ultra-detailed hair strands, soft rim light, glossy eyes, and a bittersweet first-love mood. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the composition: a large vertical pink poetic tagline on the right, a vertical white tagline on the left, a very large main title near the lower left reading {argument name="title text" default="看板娘"}, and a smaller subtitle beside it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="君と紡ぐ恋物語"}. Include 5 small rectangular film-strip preview stills aligned across the lower middle, each showing the same heroine in different emotional close-ups. Add dense credits, festival-style laurels, and small release information at the top and bottom in Japanese, with the overall feel of a premium romance anime film poster advertising a tragic, beautiful love story. Use a pastel palette of mauve, blush pink, violet, pearl white, and midnight navy, with soft bloom, shallow depth of field, and elegant poster composition.

title: Countryball Hormuz Strait Standoff
author: Geonhee Jeong
prompt: A humorous political meme illustration in a simple countryball cartoon style, showing the current situation at the {argument name="location label" default="호르무즈 해협"} as a narrow chokepoint. Use a wide landscape composition with bright flat colors, thick black outlines, and a clean hand-drawn infographic-like look. In the foreground, place 2 countryballs standing shoulder to shoulder on an extremely narrow sandy land bridge with rocks along both sides, making it obvious that only one can pass at a time. On the left is a {argument name="left country" default="United States"} countryball painted with the American flag, wearing black sunglasses and a brown cowboy hat, facing the other ball with a stubborn attitude. On the right is an {argument name="right country" default="Iran"} countryball painted with the Iranian flag, wearing a dark turban-like hat, with angry slanted eyes, also refusing to move. Add 2 large white speech bubbles, one beside each countryball, and put the same bold Korean word in both bubbles: {argument name="speech bubble text" default="길"}. In the midground and background, show a busy blue sea crowded with 9 ships total: 2 gray US warships on the far left, 1 Chinese submarine with a red Chinese flag, 4 oil tankers lined up in the center-left and center carrying different national flags, and 2 gray military ships near the narrow passage with small American flags. At the top right, include a large Iranian flag overlay along the coastline. Draw beige landmasses around the waterway to resemble a simplified map view of the Strait of Hormuz. At the bottom center, add a bold caption in Korean and English on the sand: {argument name="bottom caption" default="호르무즈 해협 (Hormuz Strait)"}. The mood should be satirical, tense, and meme-like, but visually cute and readable.

title: 蓝发动漫角色设定集
author: てばさき
prompt: {"type":"anime character reference collage","subject":{"gender_presentation":"年轻女性","age_appearance":"20 岁出头","vibe":"俏皮、自信、略带调皮、休闲街头风","ethnicity":"动漫风格的东亚形象","name":"{argument name=\"character name\" default=\"原创角色\"}","hair":{"color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"鲜艳的青蓝色\"}","style":"凌乱的下巴长度波波头，具有厚重的层次感，长长的侧分刘海遮住一只眼睛，有松散的碎发"},"eyes":{"color":"金琥珀色","shape":"锐利且富有表现力的动漫眼睛"},"accessories":["小圆环耳环","细项链"],"outfit":{"top":"白色吊带背心","outerwear":"超大款黑色羽绒服，松垮地穿在肩上","bottom":"{argument name=\"bottom garment\" default=\"蓝色牛仔短裤\"}","footwear":"全身图中赤脚"},"prop":"{argument name=\"handheld prop\" default=\"小型银色相机\"}"},"style":{"medium":"随性的高端动漫插画，草图风格的概念艺术展示","rendering":"干净的线条配合绘画感阴影，丰富而柔和的赛璐珞质感，可见笔触，白色背景","color_palette":"黑色外套衬托冷蓝色头发，白色上衣，牛仔蓝短裤，温暖的琥珀色眼睛","composition":"不对称拼贴，包含重叠的肖像和人物研究"},"layout":{"background":"纯白色","sections":[{"title":"左侧主肖像","position":"左侧","count":1,"labels":["大型半身像，四分之三侧面，手持相机"]},{"title":"顶部中心头部研究","position":"上中部","count":3,"labels":["侧面头部肖像","闭眼微笑头部肖像","看向右侧的严肃头部肖像"]},{"title":"右侧人物研究","position":"右侧","count":1,"labels":["中景坐姿或倚靠姿势，手持相机"]},{"title":"中心全身","position":"中部","count":1,"labels":["站立全身姿势，赤脚"]},{"title":"底部中心头部研究","position":"下中部","count":1,"labels":["俯视角度的头部肖像"]}],"total_visible_character_drawings":7},"camera_framing":"混合构图：3 个头部研究，1 个大型半身像，1 个中景，1 个全身站立姿势，1 个额外头部研究","prompt":"创建一个干净的白底动漫角色设计拼贴图，包含 7 幅同一位年轻女性的绘图。她拥有 {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"鲜艳的青蓝色\"} 凌乱波波头、金琥珀色眼睛，以及冷酷、俏皮的气质。包括 1 幅左侧大型半身像（手持 {argument name=\"handheld prop\" default=\"小型银色相机\"}）、3 幅顶部小型头部研究（表情和角度各异）、1 幅中心全身站立姿势、1 幅右侧中景（手持相机）以及 1 幅底部头部研究。让她穿上白色吊带背心、滑落肩头的超大款黑色羽绒服，以及 {argument name=\"bottom garment\" default=\"蓝色牛仔短裤\"}。添加圆环耳环和精致的项链。使用动态的凌乱发丝、草图风格的优雅线条、柔和的绘画感阴影，以及精致的动漫设定集美学。"}

title: Tech Tutorial Thumbnail with UI Mockup
author: corbin
prompt: A clean modern YouTube thumbnail on a bright white background, split visually between bold text on the left and a cropped presenter on the right. On the left, place a massive stacked headline in heavy black sans-serif uppercase reading {argument name="headline text" default="CLAUDE DESIGN"}, aligned top-left across two lines. Below it, add a large rounded rectangular orange banner with a subtle drop shadow containing bold white uppercase text with an orange outline that reads {argument name="subheadline text" default="IN 6 MINS"}. Near the headline, include 2 orange starburst spark shapes, one small beside the text and one much larger in the far right background. In the lower-left quadrant, show a floating app interface mockup for a design tool dashboard with a soft off-white panel, thin borders, rounded corners, and a faint shadow. The interface should have a left sidebar with 4 menu items labeled exactly: "Recent", "Your designs", "Examples", and "Design systems". The main panel header should say "Recent" and contain 3 project cards arranged in a grid, labeled exactly: "Thumio Design System", "Thumio Startup", and "Design System". On the right half, show a cropped photorealistic young adult man from chest up wearing a white turtleneck sweater, with messy light brown hair and light facial hair, positioned close to camera. His face is intentionally obscured by a solid tan rectangle placeholder covering most of the face area. He points with one hand toward the interface panel on the left, finger extended. Use a warm orange and white brand palette, high contrast, minimal clutter, polished creator-economy thumbnail styling, subtle shadows, and a composition designed for tech tutorial content.

title: Pink Kawaii Idol Lipstick Portrait
author: ねね*AIcreator
prompt: A highly detailed glossy anime idol portrait in a vertical composition, showing a cute teenage girl from the waist up in a dreamy pink kawaii aesthetic. She has {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"} hair styled in a very long voluminous high ponytail with soft bangs and flowing curled strands, decorated with multiple small heart clips and crossed hairpins. Her eyes are large, sparkling, and vivid {argument name="eye color" default="emerald green"}, with star-like highlights, long lashes, and a slightly teary shine. She has a soft blush, tiny glossy lips, and an affectionate expression while applying {argument name="lipstick color" default="bright pink"} lipstick, holding the lipstick tube delicately with both hands near her mouth. She wears a frilly black-and-pink gothic lolita idol dress with lace, ribbons, bows, heart ornaments, and sparkling textures, plus 1 black lace bow headband with a pink jeweled heart, 3 visible hair accessories on her bangs, 1 pair of dangling heart earrings, and 1 black choker with a small heart charm. Surround the character with a glowing, glitter-filled, candy-pink background full of bokeh, sparkles, soft neon light effects, and idol-fan atmosphere. Add 5 glowing hand-drawn heart text bubbles in Japanese around her, reading: "かわいすぎてごめん…♡", "推してくれてありがとうっ♡", "ずーっとだいすきっ♡", "世界でいちばんの推しになってね…♡", and "ずっと一緒だよ？約束ね…♡". Include a small decorated photo card or poster of the same girl in the upper right background. Ultra-polished illustration, dense shimmer, romantic lighting, glossy highlights, intricate lace detail, soft-focus background, saturated pink palette, adorable idol poster feel.

title: 华尔街日报风格商业报纸头版
author: Flowith
prompt: 提示词翻译前一张从上方四分之三视角拍摄的照片级真实感报纸，折叠在深色木质书桌上，风格模仿 1980 年代至 2000 年代著名的美国商业日报。报纸具有清晰逼真的新闻纸纹理、细微的纸张褶皱、略显磨损的折叠边缘，温暖的晨光在页面上投射出对角线的窗影。报头占据顶部，以醒目的大号经典衬线体大写字母书写 THE WALL STREET DAILY.。其正下方是一条细长的页眉，包含小型财经报纸细节：“DOW JONES”、“News Corp”、日期行“MONDAY, APRIL 20, 2026 – VOL. CCLXXXV NO. 90”、“WSJ.com”、星级评分行以及价格“$5.00”。主导新闻位于中上方偏左，配有巨大的粗体衬线标题 Cook to Step Down as Apple CEO; Ternus Named Successor。下方是较小的衬线副标题：“Transition caps 15-year run; company pivots to AI-driven future”。添加一行小型大写字母署名，包含两位记者：“By Tim Higgins” 和 “And Joanna Stern”。主文填充关于蒂姆·库克卸任苹果首席执行官、约翰·特努斯继任、苹果增长、AI 战略及企业转型的密集且完全可读的多栏新闻正文；文字应读起来像地道的财经新闻，而非占位符乱码。在主新闻右侧，放置一张黑白雕版点刻风格的男性高管肖像，身穿衬衫和夹克，居中于矩形图像区域；面部被眼睛和鼻梁上方的一块浅灰色遮挡方块部分遮盖，营造出一种现代讽刺效果。在右上角，包含一个标题为“What’s New”的侧边栏框，内设 2 个小节标题：“Business & Finance” 和 “World-Wide”，每个标题后跟随小型衬线字体的要点简报；“Business & Finance” 下包含 3 个要点，“World-Wide” 下包含 4 个要点，所有内容均需排版完整且清晰可读。在主新闻下方，添加一条横跨页面的二级通栏文章，标题为“Silicon Valley Braces for New Chapter in AI Arms Race”，署名为“By Liz Hoffman”，并配有几段关于大型科技公司、初创企业、OpenAI、Google、Meta、芯片、平台及 AI 竞争的短文。在此中下区域右侧，插入一个紧凑的市场表格，标题为“Markets”，包含 4 行标签，分别为“DOW JONES”、“S&P 500”、“NASDAQ” 和 “10-YR. TREASURY”，并设有指数/数值/变动/百分比列，采用逼真的报纸表格格式及真实数值。在头版底部，包含 3 个预告框：左侧框标签为“Heard on the Street”，标题为“Why Investors Are Rethinking Big Tech”，页码标记为“B12”；中间框标签为“Markets”，标题为“Earnings Season Lifts Stocks Despite Rate Uncertainty”，页码标记为“B1”；右侧框标签为“Inside”，标题为“Private Credit Sees Inflow Surge as Yields Stay High”，页码标记为“B14”。确保所有排版整洁、锐利、完全可读，并以地道的报纸网格布局保持一致对齐，栏间使用细线分隔，文字两端对齐，采用经典衬线字体，并具有逼真的印刷对比度。报纸在桌面上略微顺时针旋转。在环境中，右上角放置一个装有黑咖啡的白色陶瓷杯，报纸右下边缘附近放着一副深色边框眼镜。左上角包含一个深色圆柱形物体的裁剪边缘，看起来像是相机镜头或平底杯。整体氛围：高端编辑样机头版，严肃的商业新闻美学，可信的印刷摄影感，超高细节，自然阴影，高分辨率。

title: Santorini Luxury Dress Portrait
author: Ed
prompt: A glamorous travel-fashion portrait of a {argument name="woman" default="blonde woman"} seated on a sunlit stone ledge overlooking the caldera in Santorini, Greece, with whitewashed cliffside buildings descending toward a deep blue sea and rugged volcanic islands in the distance. She wears a flowing ivory halter dress with a very deep plunging neckline, side cutouts, a gathered waist with a circular ring detail, and soft pleated fabric draped across her lap. Her hair is long, wavy, and {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"}, styled loose over her shoulders. Add layered delicate necklaces including a small pendant and a silver cross, plus a bracelet or watch on one wrist. Place a classic white Greek church with a bright {argument name="dome color" default="blue"} dome in the upper right background, and frame the right side of the image with vivid {argument name="flower color" default="magenta pink"} bougainvillea in full bloom. Lighting is bright Mediterranean midday sun with crisp highlights, soft skin glow, and gentle depth of field that keeps the woman sharp while the background architecture and sea are slightly softened. Composition is vertical, elegant and aspirational, with the woman centered slightly right, torso visible down to the flowing skirt, scenic coastline stretching across the left half of the frame. Add small black text in the top-left corner reading {argument name="corner text" default="GPT V2"}. Photorealistic luxury vacation aesthetic, high detail, natural colors, editorial Instagram travel vibe.

title: Cute Four-Panel Cat Jealousy Comic
author: Maoku
prompt: A cute hand-drawn four-panel comic in a soft, warm, slice-of-life style on a light cream background with thick black panel borders and slightly textured paper grain. Use simple rounded cartoon cat anatomy, expressive faces, clean black outlines, muted natural colors, and a gentle manga-like presentation. In the top-left panel, show 2 cats: a brown tabby cat with dark stripes and white muzzle sitting with eyes closed, looking pleased, while a mostly white cat with dark brown patches on the head stands beside it and affectionately licks the tabby's cheek; add 2 small black musical notes above them to suggest happy grooming. In the top-right panel, show the white-and-brown patched cat in the foreground looking toward a small calico kitten standing to the right; include a speech bubble containing the Japanese text "めい" above the kitten. In the bottom-left panel, show 3 cats together: the brown tabby on the left with a surprised or blank expression, the white patched cat on the right looking cheerful, and the small calico kitten centered in front between them, looking up. In the bottom-right panel, show a close-up of the brown tabby cat alone, facing forward with narrowed yellow-green eyes and an angry, jealous expression; add 2 short emphasis lines near the face and 1 small puff-shaped anger symbol to the right. Keep the tone cozy and comedic, with the visual joke that the tabby was happy being groomed until the new kitten appears. Use flat colors, minimal shading, and a charming Japanese webcomic feel.

title: Minimal Pelican Riding Bicycle
author: Justin Schroeder
prompt: A minimalist vector-style illustration on a flat light gray background showing a pelican riding a bicycle, drawn from simple geometric shapes with thick dark charcoal outlines. The composition is wide and centered, with the bicycle occupying the lower two-thirds of the image and the bird’s head floating slightly above and forward of the handlebars in a deliberately abstract, diagram-like way. The bicycle is a simple black road-bike silhouette in side view with exactly 2 large wheels, each with a thick outer rim and exactly 4 visible spoke lines forming a cross, a straight horizontal ground line beneath both wheels, a triangular frame, a short black saddle, and simplified crank and pedal details near the rear of the frame. The pelican is constructed from clean abstract pieces: a white rounded head with a small black circular eye, a long open beak pointing left made of 2 parts with an upper orange triangular section and a lower pale pink pouch section, a short dark curve on top of the head, a small separate white oval neck/body connector, a larger white rounded body positioned over the bike, and a single white wing-like shape angled upward over the back. Add exactly 2 orange leg shapes, long narrow rectangles leaning downward from the body toward the bicycle frame, suggesting the bird is pedaling. Keep the forms intentionally sparse and slightly surreal, like a logo test or simple code-editor doodle, with no shading, no gradients, no textures, no text, and lots of negative space.

title: Minimalist Fashion Moodboard Outfit
author: 虎小象
prompt: A clean editorial fashion collage on a light gray-white background with a thin black rectangular border, styled like a minimalist magazine outfit board. Center the outfit as a flat lay style composition with 5 visible fashion items: a bright {argument name="jacket color" default="crimson red"} cropped zip-front jacket with a pointed collar and elastic hem placed slightly left and layered on top; underneath it, a fitted {argument name="top color" default="white"} long-sleeve crew-neck knit top visible at the shoulders and sleeves; below, a voluminous mid-calf A-line skirt in off-white with evenly spaced large black polka dots; at lower left, a structured small black handbag with short top handles and a subtle glossy crocodile texture; at lower right, one pair of black square-toe Mary Jane flats with wide straps and silver grommet-ring hardware. Add oversized very pale gray background typography reading {argument name="background brand text" default="MANGO"} stretched large across the middle behind the clothing. Place smaller black fashion-brand wordmarks around the layout: {argument name="top right logo" default="MANGO"} near the upper right of the outfit, "Stradivarius" near the handbag and again near the shoes, and "DOLCE & GABBANA" at the lower left near the skirt hem. The composition should feel balanced, chic, and contemporary, with soft studio lighting, no shadows or only faint soft shadows, crisp cutout edges, and a polished social-media fashion moodboard aesthetic.

title: Luxury Indoor Mirror Selfie Portrait
author: Danna R.
prompt: A realistic indoor mirror selfie of a slender glamorous young woman standing in a softly lit upscale living room or hotel suite, photographed vertically from head to below the knees. She wears a form-fitting cream or ivory bodycon midi dress with elegant draping and ruching, featuring an asymmetrical neckline with 1 shoulder strap crossing diagonally over the chest and leaving the other shoulder bare. Her hair is long, dark brown, softly wavy, and parted near the center, falling over both shoulders. She holds a smartphone in her right hand in front of her face, partially covering it, with the phone angled toward a wall mirror; the phone has a dark case with a red cloud pattern. Her left arm hangs naturally by her side. Add subtle jewelry: 1 thin necklace with a small pendant, 1 silver bracelet or bangle on the right wrist, and rings on the fingers of the hand holding the phone. Emphasize a realistic feminine silhouette, smooth skin, soft warm ambient lighting, and polished editorial social-media style photography. The background should include 1 beige sofa behind her, 1 brown leather handbag resting on the right side of the sofa, 1 textured stone or concrete accent wall behind the mirror area, and a warm hallway on the left with 2 framed wall artworks visible. Use natural indoor shadows, refined skin texture, realistic fabric folds and compression around the waist and hips, luxury apartment aesthetic, clean composition, and high detail.

title: Realistic McDonald's Selfie Portrait
author: AB Kuai.Dong
prompt: A highly realistic casual smartphone selfie taken indoors at a McDonald's restaurant in Asia, framed as a chest-up portrait of a young man seated at a table. The camera is held slightly above table height at arm’s length, creating a natural front-facing selfie perspective with one forearm extending toward the lens. The subject wears a black T-shirt with a small white Tesla logo on the left chest, has short straight black hair, thin dark eyeglass frames partly visible, and rests one hand lightly against his chin in a relaxed pose. His face is fully obscured by a large solid rectangular blur block in the center, preserving privacy while leaving the hair, ears, jawline edges, and glasses arms visible. In the lower left foreground sits 1 white McDonald's paper drink cup with a lid and a white straw, cropped by the frame. The background shows the restaurant counter area with warm ambient lighting, 1 large red wall panel on the left featuring the yellow McDonald's arches and the white slogan “i’m lovin’ it” with Chinese text below, 4 illuminated digital menu boards across the top displaying burgers, fries, combo meals, prices, and Chinese text, plus 2 people in the background near the counter, one facing away with a backpack and another partially visible behind the register. Use natural color balance, slight indoor grain, realistic reflections, shallow to moderate depth of field, and the candid look of an unstaged social media snapshot.

title: Apple macOS 重新设计宣传样机
author: doanbactam
prompt: 一张精致的 Apple 风格 macOS 宣传桌面样机，以全屏截图形式呈现。壁纸采用柔和的淡彩晨曦风格，描绘了淡桃色与薰衣草色天空下层叠的紫蓝色连绵山丘。顶部中央是一个巨大的极简主义标题“macOS”，下方副标题为“Redesigned.”，再下方是一行较小的文字：“More clarity. More focus. More you.”。顶部系统菜单栏横跨整个屏幕：左侧依次为 Apple 图标、Finder、文件、编辑、显示、前往、窗口、帮助；右侧为 Wi‑Fi、电池、搜索、彩色用户图标以及日期时间“6 月 10 日周一 上午 9:41”。左侧垂直堆叠 4 个半透明圆角小组件：一个显示“Sonoma, CA”、“65°”、“晴天”、最高/最低气温“H:72° L:55°”以及上午 10 点至下午 3 点每小时气温的天气小组件；一个显示“Design Review”和“Lunch with Sophie”及其时间的“接下来”日程小组件；一个显示“勿扰模式”及“开启至上午 10:00”的“专注”小组件；以及一个包含“Website redesign”笔记和时间“下午 3:30”的“备忘录”小组件。在左中前景处放置一个带有圆角和轻盈磨砂界面的 Finder 窗口，标题为“iCloud Drive”。左侧边栏包含 10 个项目：个人收藏包含“隔空投送”、“最近使用”、“应用程序”、“桌面”、“文稿”、“下载”6 个项目；iCloud 包含“iCloud Drive”和“共享”2 个项目；位置包含“Macintosh HD”1 个项目。Finder 主区域以网格形式显示 8 个文件：顶行是标记为“Work”、“Personal”、“Projects”、“Presentations”的 4 个文件夹，底行是标记为“Brand Guidelines.pdf”、“Project Brief.docx”、“Research.png”、“Moodboard.key”的 4 个文档。标题栏包含标准的 macOS 交通灯窗口按钮及小型视图/搜索控件。右侧重叠一个三栏布局的“邮件”应用窗口。左侧邮件列表栏标题为“收件箱”，显示“1237 封邮件”及 5 条可见的发件人/邮件摘要：“Antonio Manriquez”的“Design updates”、“Jenny Court”的“Re: Team lunch”、“Heather Lee”的“Q3 Planning”、“Nisha Kumar”的“Re: Feedback”以及“Simon Pickford”的“Offsite ideas”。阅读窗格显示选中的 Antonio Manriquez 发给你的邮件，主题为“Design updates”，正文内容关于新功能的附件样机，并附有一个标记为“Mockups.zip”和“12.4 MB”的文件附件卡片。采用简洁的 SF Pro 风格字体、微妙的阴影、半透明的玻璃拟态面板、柔和的环境光以及高端的 Apple Keynote 美学。底部中央包含一个光泽半透明的 macOS 程序坞，内含 15 个图标：Finder、启动台、Safari、信息、邮件、显示“6 月 10 日”的日历、照片、备忘录、提醒事项、TV、音乐、新闻、App Store、系统设置和废纸篓。整体构图平衡、通透、写实且高度精致，宛如 Apple 官方发布的 macOS 重新设计公告图。

title: Sunset Catgirl School Rooftop Anime
author: Nobu-Kobayashi : Generative AI Technology
prompt: A high-quality anime illustration of a {argument name="character type" default="cat-eared schoolgirl"} leaning forward over a metal school rooftop railing at sunset, shown from a slightly low, close three-quarter angle. She has long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair with soft highlights, large reflective gray-brown eyes, round thin-rim glasses, and 2 fluffy cat ears emerging from her hair. Her expression is quiet, wistful, and slightly shy, with parted lips and a gentle downward gaze toward the viewer. She wears a Japanese sailor school uniform with a soft {argument name="uniform color" default="pink"} long-sleeve top, a gray sailor collar with white stripes, a vivid red neckerchief bow, and a plaid skirt partially visible, with 2 dark backpack straps over her shoulders. The scene is drenched in dramatic golden-hour backlighting, with intense warm rim light along her hair, ears, shoulders, and sleeves, glowing sun flare from the lower left, and a richly painted sky full of orange and peach clouds. In the background, show a 2-story Japanese school building with a red-tiled roof and glowing windows lit by the sunset. Emphasize nostalgic early-2000s high-end anime key visual quality, delicate linework, luminous eyes, detailed hair strands, cinematic composition, soft depth of field, vibrant warm color grading, polished shading, and an emotional serene atmosphere.

title: Brainrot 阶梯教室投影仪
author: AIxHunter
prompt: A realistic photograph taken from the audience in a dimly lit university lecture hall, looking over the backs of the heads of three students in the foreground towards a large projector screen. The projector screen displays a layout split into three distinct vertical panels. The left panel shows vertical {argument name="left game" default="Subway Surfers gameplay"}, featuring a character running on train tracks collecting gold coins with UI elements like a score of "001022". The wide center panel displays an academic presentation slide titled "{argument name="slide topic" default="9.3: Infinite Geometric Series"}". The slide contains math text: "Example 3: Find the sum of the infinite geometric series. 1/3 - 1/9 + 1/27 - 1/81 + ... Solution: The series is geometric with a = 1/3 and r = -1/3. Since |r| < 1, the infinite geometric series converges. S = a / (1 - r) = (1/3) / (1 - (-1/3)) = (1/3) / (4/3) = 1/4. The sum of the series is 1/4." The slide footer reads "{argument name="professor name" default="Dr. Larson"}", "{argument name="course name" default="Calculus II"}", "11/14/2024", and "7 / 35". The right panel shows vertical {argument name="right game" default="Minecraft parkour gameplay"}, featuring floating wooden blocks over a grassy landscape with a TikTok watermark at the bottom right. The room has a drop ceiling and blackboards visible behind the screen edges.

The screen displays a slide with a light blue background. At the top left is a small teal pill-shaped badge reading "NEW DATA". Below it, the main headline reads "{argument name="headline" default="Microsoft Edge is the #1 browser to download Google Chrome"}", with "#1" highlighted in blue. A subheadline reads "% of Google Chrome downloads that started from another browser". Below this is a bar chart with three bars. The first bar is tall and blue, labeled "38.6%" above it, with the Microsoft Edge logo and text "Microsoft Edge" below it. The second bar is shorter and gray, labeled "17.2%" above it, with the Mozilla Firefox logo and text "Mozilla Firefox" below it. The third bar is the shortest and gray, labeled "13.0%" above it, with the Apple Safari logo and text "Apple Safari" below it. At the bottom left of the slide, small text reads "Source: Microsoft internal analysis of Google Chrome download referrals Cohort: Windows 10 and 11, Worldwide, Jan - March 2024". To the left of the screen, a wooden panel features the Microsoft logo (four colored squares). The backs of audience members' heads are visible in the foreground at the bottom.

title: 讽刺风格西班牙体育报纸头版
author: Germán Huertas
prompt: 一张设计成小报封面的讽刺风格西班牙体育报纸头版，全画幅且完全正面视角，印在略显陈旧的米白色新闻纸上，带有细腻的纸张纹理、淡淡的污渍和细窄的黑色边框。报头顶部横跨一条亮黄色横幅，印有巨大的红色“SPORT”标志。右上角包含 1 个小型采访推广框，内含一名足球运动员的头像，以及西班牙语文本块：“ENTREVISTA CUBARSÍ ‘ESTOY PARA COSAS GRANDES’”。在报头下方，添加一条带有粗体黑色文字“EXCLUSIVA MUNDIAL”的黄色长条，并配有一个红色小闪电图标。主标题以巨大的黑色压缩大写字母占据页面核心位置，分为 2 行：“LAMILE FICHA POR LA PEÑA DEL BINGO”。在其下方，添加斜体黑色西班牙语副标题：“El crack pide dorsal el 10 y bocadillo de calamares en el contrato”。主照片占据页面左中及中下部：一名年轻足球运动员背影为主，身穿蓝红条纹的巴塞罗那主场球衣，球衣上印有大号黄色字母“LAMILE”和数字“10”，站在充满纸屑、强光、模糊球迷及人群的庆祝球场场景中。他手持或展示着一张巨大的宾果游戏项目，顶部写有“BINGO”，底部写有“BINGO!”。在右侧，创建一个包含 4 个堆叠内容块的垂直侧边栏：第一部分是一张盘中鱿鱼三明治的照片，配文“El motivo del fichaje”；第二部分是一个红色信息框，列出 3 条幽默的转会事实，文字为黄色和白色，内容为：“EDAD: muy joven”、“FICHAJE: 4 cartones”以及“CLÁUSULA: una partida de parchís”；第三部分是一个引语栏，包含 3 个堆叠的小项目，每个项目都有一个小肖像和西班牙语说明：“XAVI: ‘No me lo esperaba, pero respeto’”、“LAPORTA: ‘Renegociaremos en el próximo bingo’”以及“EL VESTUARIO: Le preparan línea y bingo de bienvenida”；第四部分是底部的一个小型赛车预告，配有车手图像和文字“FÓRMULA 1 ALONSO SUEÑA CON EL PODIO EN YEDA”。沿底部长条，包含 3 个小型预告面板：1 名手持奖杯的女足运动员，配文“CHAMPIONS FEMENINA LA REINA AITANA QUIERE OTRA CORONA”；1 个篮球面板，包含两名巴萨球员，配文“BÁSQUET EL BARÇA, A UN PAS DE LA FINAL FOUR”；以及已整合在右边缘的 F1 赛车预告面板。在报头左下方添加微小的西班牙语报纸元数据，包括期号、日期和价格，例如“Nº 16.743 MIÉRCOLES 22 DE ABRIL DE 2026 2,00 EUROS”。整体风格应为超写实的印刷报纸封面摄影和编辑排版，具备地道的杂志排版、强烈的黑色标题、饱和的体育照片色彩、喜剧性的转会传闻恶搞基调，以及天衣无缝且可信的印刷设计。

title: Next-Gen Voxel Game Screenshot
author: wolfaidev 🐺
prompt: A highly detailed, realistic first-person video game screenshot of a next-generation voxel-based world. At the top center, a large, bold 3D logo reads "{argument name="game title" default="MINECRAFT 2"}". The scene features a {argument name="environment" default="lush, blocky landscape with a river, a small wooden cabin, a windmill, a waterfall, and majestic mountains in the background"}. The world blends realistic lighting, volumetric clouds, and high-resolution textures with cubic, voxel geometry. In the foreground on the left, a {argument name="mob 1" default="blocky green creeper"} stands on the grass, while a {argument name="mob 2" default="blocky brown wolf"} stands on the dirt path to the right. On the far right, the player's hand holds a {argument name="held item" default="pixelated blue diamond sword"} in a first-person perspective. At the bottom of the screen is a game user interface featuring a health bar with 10 red hearts, a green experience bar with the number '16', a hunger bar with 10 brown meat icons, and a 9-slot inventory hotbar. The hotbar contains, from left to right: a selected blue tool with a green highlight box, a green tool, a knife, a wrench with the number '3', a piece of meat with '6', a lantern with '24', a dirt block with '10', a bucket, and a sponge block.

title: 从线框图到企业网页横幅
author: KAWAI
prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as a wireframe layout, generate a polished, professional corporate web banner ad for an AI sales tool. Use a clean blue, white, and orange color palette. Transform the sketched character into a photorealistic image of 2 smiling Japanese business professionals (a man and a woman in suits) looking at a silver laptop in a bright office. In the top left, add a logo for {argument name="brand name" default="KAWAISALES"} with a small tagline 'AIを活用した新しい営業支援ツール'. Map the wireframe's text bubbles as follows: replace the top bubble with a white oval containing the blue text {argument name="main copy" default="その営業、AIで「飛躍」しませんか？"}; replace the middle bubble with {argument name="sub copy" default="リード獲得からクロージングまでAIがあなたの営業活動を強力サポート！"}. Replace the bottom CTA box with a bright orange pill-shaped button reading {argument name="cta text" default="今すぐ 無料デモを体験する >"}. In the lower-right center, add a blue 3D-style bar chart with an upward arrow, accompanied by a target icon showing 3 user silhouettes and a white UI card with 4 checkmarked bullet points. Finally, add a white panel in the bottom left containing exactly 3 blue line-art icons (a clock, a rising chart, and a laptop) with short captions below each.

title: Censored Point-Cloud Portrait
author: Harshith
prompt: A minimalist monochrome portrait made entirely from millions of tiny white point-cloud dots on a pitch-black background, showing 1 adult man from the chest up in a formal dark blazer and light collared dress shirt. The subject is centered slightly to the right, facing forward with a subtle three-quarter turn, with neatly combed short hair and one visible ear sharply defined by dense lidar-like particles. Render the figure as raw 3D scan data mixed with topological contour logic: ultra-dense stippling, precise geometric dot placement, faint isoline structure, and clean depth shaping across the hair, jacket lapels, collar, neck, and shoulders. Keep the face intentionally obscured by 1 large vertical rectangular censor block in dark gray to black, perfectly centered over the facial area from forehead to below the nose, creating a stark privacy-mask effect. Use matte texture, crisp edges, sharp focus, high contrast, no glow, no bloom, no neon, no fog, no motion blur, no chromatic aberration, no painterly strokes. Add 1 small four-point sparkle icon in light gray in the bottom-right corner. The overall image should feel mathematical, forensic, and futuristic, like a high-resolution lidar scan portrait in 8k.

A vertical catchphrase on the left reads "{argument name="left catchphrase" default="世界を守るため、俺はもっと悪になる。"}" and another on the right reads "世界を敵に回しても、あなたの隣にいたい。". Additional text at the bottom includes author credits and a publisher logo. The overall mood is dramatic and romantic with dynamic lighting.

title: 动漫恐怖游戏缩略图合成
